# Attribute namespace: `app`

<!-- DO NOT EDIT - AUTOGENERATED FILE. Regenerate with scripts/generate-docs.sh -->

| Attribute | Type | Stability | Description | Examples |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `app.environment` | `string` | development | The runtime environment in which the app is deployed. | `prod`, `dev`, `staging` |
| `app.nav.destination` | `string` | development | A human-readable string that uniquely identifies the destination of app navigation. This value should not contain high-cardinality dimensions like user ID, which should be replaced with a generic token if programmatically determined. | `Home Page`, `com.app.UserActivity`, `{userId} Profile` |
